skills.name: odoo-think
skills.artifact: Risk-oriented scoping brief with module map, business entrypoint, cross-app impact, and open questions.

skills.name: odoo-plan
skills.artifact: Ordered execution plan with file map, acceptance criteria, test matrix, rollout notes, and open decisions.

skills.name: odoo-build
skills.artifact: Concrete in-scope code or configuration changes plus noted assumptions and follow-up validation needs.

skills.name: odoo-review
skills.artifact: Structured findings on an existing diff or artifact, separated into required fixes, open risks, and optional improvements.

skills.name: odoo-test
skills.artifact: Current-change validation evidence or validation plan tied to a specific diff, addon, bug, or runtime scenario.

skills.name: odoo-ship
skills.artifact: Go or no-go rollout checklist with staging verification, release sequencing, rollback cautions, and production notes.

skills.name: odoo-reflect
skills.artifact: Retrospective with lessons, remaining gaps, and concrete follow-up actions.

skills.name: odoo-architecture
skills.artifact: Architecture recommendation with target addon, dependency rationale, and bridge-module guidance.

skills.name: odoo-orm-modeling
skills.artifact: ORM modeling guidance with field or method recommendations and anti-pattern checks.

skills.name: odoo-view-ui
skills.artifact: UI guidance with view strategy, inheritance notes, and action or menu recommendations.

skills.name: odoo-security
skills.artifact: Security assessment with trust boundaries, permission checks, exposure risks, and required safeguards.

skills.name: odoo-testing-reference
skills.artifact: Framework and test-authoring guidance for future or current test design, without claiming current-change readiness.

skills.name: odoo-performance
skills.artifact: Performance guidance with hotspot hypotheses, optimization levers, and validation ideas.

skills.name: odoo-integration-api
skills.artifact: Integration design guidance with auth model, data flow, safety considerations, and operational constraints.

skills.name: odoo-upgrade-migration
skills.artifact: Migration strategy with data-preservation plan, script notes, rollout order, and validation needs.

skills.name: odoo-delivery-ops
skills.artifact: Operational mechanics guidance covering commands, flags, environment behavior, and runtime cautions.

skills.name: odoo-business-sales
skills.artifact: Sales process map from a backend sales entrypoint, with downstream documents, roles, and cross-app impacts.

skills.name: odoo-business-purchase
skills.artifact: Purchase process map with entrypoint, downstream documents, roles, and cross-app impacts.

skills.name: odoo-business-inventory
skills.artifact: Inventory process map from a warehouse or stock-document entrypoint, with route logic, valuation, and cross-app effects.

skills.name: odoo-business-manufacturing
skills.artifact: Manufacturing process map from a BoM or MO entrypoint, with operations, stock effects, and downstream cross-app impacts.

skills.name: odoo-business-accounting
skills.artifact: Accounting process map with finance documents, posting impacts, and cross-app implications.

skills.name: odoo-business-hr
skills.artifact: HR process map from a workforce entrypoint, with employee lifecycle touchpoints and cross-app dependencies.

skills.name: odoo-business-timesheet-project-services
skills.artifact: Service-delivery process map with task, time, billing, and cross-app impacts.

skills.name: odoo-business-expenses
skills.artifact: Expense process map from an expense-claim entrypoint, with states, roles, accounting impacts, and related HR links.

skills.name: odoo-business-website-ecommerce
skills.artifact: Website and ecommerce process map from a public or portal entrypoint, with customer journey, downstream sales flow, and cross-app impacts.

skills.name: odoo-local-test-harness
skills.artifact: Operational mechanics guidance covering local Odoo test harness setup and command construction.
